name: New Wave Chocolate Spritz Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 package NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate morsels (6 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Over hot (not boiling) water, melt Nestle Toll House semi-sweet chocolate morsels and stir until smooth. Set aside.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat together butter, sugar, and vanilla extract until creamy.
3. Beat in eggs. Gradually add the melted chocolate mixture. Stir in flour. Cover dough and refrigerate for 30-45 minutes.
4. Preheat oven to 400°F. Place dough in a cookie press fitted with a star plate.
5. Press dough into 2-inch circles on ungreased cookie sheets; decorate with cinnamon candies.
6. Bake for 5 minutes or until just set. Let stand on cookie sheets for 2 minutes before removing them.
7. Cool cookies completely.
Makes about 7 1/2 dozen cookies.
